category_sources: source_facts.description says topfew finds field values that appear most often in a stream of records.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as topfew.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface provided.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/timbray/topfew, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes frequency analysis over streamed records; source_facts.executables lists topfew.
